ground_truth.description: Photo of Daedalus statue in Pompeii taken from the back. Could be confusing as similar to centaur statue in same city. Mountain visible in foreground.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo of the Daedalus statue in Pompeii taken from the back. Could be confusing because it's taken from the back, and it looks similar to the statue of a centaur in the same city. Impressive, but not too impressive if it gets the correct one. In the foreground you can see a mountain. Daytime, summer, clear weather.

details.description: A large contemporary bronze statue of a headless and armless nude male torso stands on a rust-colored corten-steel plinth amid ancient masonry blocks. A tall spear rises upright beside the figure. The setting is an open terrace within the Pompeii ruins, with metal railings and scattered stone fragments in the foreground. In the distance are the urban plain and the dark, rugged slopes of the Lattari Mountains under a clear blue sky. Bright midday sunlight casts hard shadows, emphasizing the green-brown patina of the bronze.

details.description: A life-size bronze statue of a nude male, viewed from behind, stands on a reddish-brown pedestal among ancient ruins and scattered stone blocks on a hill overlooking the city of Pompeii. The patina gives the figure a greenish cast. The statue appears to be holding a vertical staff or spear behind its back, with no visible arms extended forward. A low metal railing and some shrubbery frame the foreground, reinforcing the viewpoint on a memorial or overlook site. In the mid-distance, Pompeii’s densely built town stretches across the plain, while distant, rugged mountains form a backdrop. Above, a clear blue sky and the silhouette of Mount Vesuvius dominate the horizon, suggesting a bright, sunny day.

details.description: A monumental, headless and armless bronze nude male figure, characteristic of Igor Mitoraj’s fragmentary style, stands on a rust-red corten-steel plinth. A thin vertical rod rises along the sculpture’s right side and a small square patch plate is visible on the back. The artwork is set among low Roman ruins and stone blocks on a terrace with metal railings, overlooking the Sarno Valley and the modern town of Pompei, backed by blue-gray mountains under a clear sky. Trees flank the viewpoint. The setting corresponds to the terrace area by the Temple of Venus inside the Pompeii Archaeological Park.

details.description: Bronze statue with a green patina depicts a standing nude male, viewed from behind with arms missing and a slender staff-like element near the back; it sits on a tall reddish-brown pedestal in an archaeological site overlooking Pompeii, with the ruins of the ancient city and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. In the foreground are scattered stone blocks and remnants of construction, with a railing near the base. The photographer appears to be on Via Marina in Pompeii, looking toward the urban landscape of the ancient city and the surrounding scenery.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing the bronze sculpture 'Daedalus' (Dedalo) by Igor Mitoraj, viewed from behind. The statue depicts a fragmented, muscular male nude torso with a square cutout in the back and missing limbs, holding a vertical staff or spear. It stands on a rust-colored rectangular pedestal. The foreground features ancient grey stone ruins, blocks, and wall fragments characteristic of the archaeological site. The background reveals a panoramic view of the modern urban sprawl in the Sarno valley below, backed by the hazy blue silhouette of the Lattari Mountains (Monti Lattari) and Monte Faito under a clear, bright blue sky.

details.description: A large bronze sculpture of a male figure, seen from behind, stands on a rust-colored rectangular pedestal. The statue, titled 'Dedalo' (Daedalus) by artist Igor Mitoraj, is depicted in a fragmented classical style, missing its arms and lower legs, with a spear leaning against its left side. It is situated within the ruins of the Temple of Venus in Pompeii, surrounded by ancient stone blocks and a fallen Corinthian capital. In the background, a lush valley with modern buildings leads to the prominent peaks of the Lattari Mountains under a clear blue sky.

details.description: A monumental contemporary bronze statue of a nude male figure stands on a rust-colored (corten steel) pedestal among ancient stone ruins. The figure is fragmented in the characteristic style of Igor Mitoraj, with missing forearms and a small square patch on the body; a long rod or spear passes behind the shoulders. The setting is an archaeological site on a terrace with metal railings, with a wide valley and steep mountains in the distance under a clear blue sky—consistent with the landscape around Pompeii.

details.description: A life-size bronze sculpture of a nude male figure stands on a red rectangular pedestal at the edge of a rough stone viewing terrace. The figure is carved with muscular detail and a patinated greenish surface, facing away from the camera with shoulders broad and a rod or spear-like element extending horizontally from the back. The setting is an elevated, rocky overlook with stone blocks, a metal railing, and sparse greenery. In the distance, steep Alpine mountains rise above a valley that contains a town, under a clear blue sky. The overall scene suggests a sculpture installed at a scenic vantage point on a hillside.

entities.name: Bronze statue of a nude male figure

entities.name: Alpine mountains in the background
entities.notes: Dramatic high-altitude peaks suggesting northern Italian Alps; hazy town below in a valley.

details.description: Rear view of a monumental verdigris bronze nude male figure in a fragmentary, classicizing style standing on a rust-colored corten-steel plinth amid the stone ruins of Pompeii. The armless figure shows Mitoraj’s characteristic seams and patches, with a long rod aligned across the shoulder area. Low railings, tumbled masonry, and archaeological remains surround the statue. Beyond the site, a town spreads across the valley and a broad conical mountain ridge—Mount Vesuvius—rises under a clear blue midday sky. The artwork and setting match Igor Mitoraj’s bronze ‘Daedalus’ installed within the Pompeii Archaeological Park (Forum area), with Vesuvius in the background.

details.description: Outdoor bronze statue of a life-size male nude in classical style, standing with a rod-like element projecting horizontally from the back. The figure, with a green patina, is viewed from behind/three-quarter rear, facing a valley and distant mountains. It sits on a rectangular red pedestal on a rocky terrace with stone blocks, low walls, and metal railings, with greenery nearby. In the background a valley town and tall rugged mountains stretch under a clear blue sky.

details.description: A photograph, oriented sideways (rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise relative to the horizon), depicting a large bronze sculpture of a male figure viewed from behind. The statue, created in a fragmented classical style characteristic of the artist Igor Mitoraj, features a muscular torso with a missing right arm and holds a staff or spear in the left hand. It stands on a reddish-brown rectangular pedestal positioned at the edge of an ancient stone terrace, likely part of a ruined temple. In the background, a hazy, majestic mountain range (the Lattari Mountains) rises above a sprawling urban valley floor, under a clear, bright blue sky. To the right (bottom of the frame), ancient stone walls and a metal safety railing are visible, indicating an archaeological site.

details.description: A large bronze sculpture of a male figure, seen from the back, stands on a rectangular pedestal. The statue, titled 'Daedalus' by artist Igor Mitoraj, is rendered in a fragmented classical style, missing its arms and featuring a spear resting against its shoulder. It is positioned within the Pompeii Archaeological Park, overlooking a panoramic view of the modern city of Pompei and the Lattari Mountains in the distance. The foreground contains ancient stone ruins and a metal railing. The lighting is bright and direct, suggesting a clear, sunny day.
